```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const THREE = await import("https://esm.sh/three@0.155.0");
  const { OrbitControls } = await import("https://esm.sh/three@0.155.0/examples/jsm/controls/OrbitControls");

  function sphericalToUnit(theta, phi) {
    return new THREE.Vector3(
      Math.sin(phi) * Math.cos(theta),
      Math.sin(phi) * Math.sin(theta),
      Math.cos(phi)
    ).normalize();
  }

  function fmt(x) {
    const y = Math.abs(x) < 1e-10 ? 0 : x;
    return y.toFixed(2);
  }

  function slider(min, max, step, value) {
    const el = document.createElement("input");
    el.type = "range";
    el.min = String(min);
    el.max = String(max);
    el.step = String(step);
    el.value = String(value);
    el.style.width = "100%";
    return el;
  }

  function makeSliderRow(labelText, input) {
    const row = document.createElement("div");
    row.style.marginBottom = "10px";

    const label = document.createElement("label");
    label.style.display = "grid";
    label.style.gridTemplateColumns = "36px 1fr 56px";
    label.style.gap = "10px";
    label.style.alignItems = "center";

    const name = document.createElement("span");
    name.textContent = labelText;

    const value = document.createElement("span");
    value.style.fontFamily = "monospace";
    value.style.fontSize = "12px";
    value.textContent = input.value;

    input.addEventListener("input", () => {
      value.textContent = input.value;
    });

    label.appendChild(name);
    label.appendChild(input);
    label.appendChild(value);
    row.appendChild(label);

    return row;
  }

  const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
  wrapper.style.width = "100%";
  wrapper.style.margin = "1rem 0";

  const panel = document.createElement("div");
  panel.style.fontFamily = "sans-serif";
  panel.style.fontSize = "14px";
  panel.style.lineHeight = "1.45";
  panel.style.marginBottom = "14px";
  panel.style.maxWidth = "520px";
  panel.style.margin = "0 auto 14px auto";

  const title = document.createElement("h4");
  title.textContent = "Interactive plane";
  title.style.margin = "0 0 10px 0";
  panel.appendChild(title);

  const controlsGrid = document.createElement("div");
  controlsGrid.style.display = "grid";
  controlsGrid.style.gridTemplateColumns = "repeat(3, minmax(180px, 1fr))";
  controlsGrid.style.gap = "12px";
  controlsGrid.style.marginBottom = "12px";

  const p0x = slider(-2, 2, 0.01, 0.00);
  const p0y = slider(-2, 2, 0.01, 0.00);
  const p0z = slider(-2, 2, 0.01, 0.00);

  controlsGrid.appendChild(makeSliderRow("p₀x", p0x));
  controlsGrid.appendChild(makeSliderRow("p₀y", p0y));
  controlsGrid.appendChild(makeSliderRow("p₀z", p0z));
  panel.appendChild(controlsGrid);

  const note = document.createElement("div");
  note.style.color = "#555";
  note.style.marginBottom = "12px";
  note.innerHTML =
    "The camera is fixed. Drag the plane to rotate it, and use the sliders to move <strong>p₀</strong>. The red and blue arrows show the two direction vectors, and the black arrow shows the normal, all drawn from the same base corner of the plane.";
  panel.appendChild(note);

  const eqn = document.createElement("div");
  eqn.style.padding = "10px 12px";
  eqn.style.border = "1px solid #ddd";
  eqn.style.borderRadius = "8px";
  eqn.style.background = "#fafafa";
  eqn.style.fontFamily = "monospace";
  eqn.style.fontSize = "13px";
  eqn.style.marginBottom = "14px";
  panel.appendChild(eqn);

  const canvasHost = document.createElement("div");
  canvasHost.style.width = "100%";
  canvasHost.style.maxWidth = "620px";
  canvasHost.style.aspectRatio = "2 / 1";
  canvasHost.style.margin = "0 auto";
  canvasHost.style.border = "1px solid #ddd";
  canvasHost.style.borderRadius = "10px";
  canvasHost.style.background = "white";

  wrapper.appendChild(panel);
  wrapper.appendChild(canvasHost);

  const scene = new THREE.Scene();
  scene.background = new THREE.Color(0xffffff);
  scene.up.set(0, 0, 1);

  const camera = new THREE.OrthographicCamera(-3.6, 3.6, 2.8, -2.8, 0.1, 100);
  camera.position.set(3.5, -3.5, 2.8);
  camera.up.set(0, 0, 1);
  camera.lookAt(0, 0, 0);

  const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true });
  renderer.setPixelRatio(window.devicePixelRatio || 1);
  const w = canvasHost.clientWidth || 900;
  const h = canvasHost.clientHeight || (w * 0.4);
  renderer.setSize(w, h, false);
  canvasHost.appendChild(renderer.domElement);
  renderer.domElement.style.width = "100%";
  renderer.domElement.style.height = "100%";
  renderer.domElement.style.display = "block";

  const controls = new OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
  controls.enableDamping = false;
  controls.enableRotate = false;
  controls.enablePan = false;
  controls.enableZoom = false;

  scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.95));
  const light = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.85);
  light.position.set(4, 5, 3);
  scene.add(light);

  const grid = new THREE.GridHelper(10, 10, 0xcccccc, 0xeeeeee);
  grid.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  scene.add(grid);

  const axesGroup = new THREE.Group();
  const axisLen = 2.6;

  function makeAxisLine(dir) {
    const points = [new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 0), dir.clone().multiplyScalar(axisLen)];
    const geom = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints(points);
    return new THREE.Line(geom, new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0x444444 }));
  }

  axesGroup.add(makeAxisLine(new THREE.Vector3(1, 0, 0)));
  axesGroup.add(makeAxisLine(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0)));
  axesGroup.add(makeAxisLine(new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 1)));
  scene.add(axesGroup);

  const origin = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 0);
  let isDraggingPlane = false;
  let lastPointerX = 0;
  let lastPointerY = 0;
  const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
  const pointer = new THREE.Vector2();

  function pointerToNDC(event) {
    const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();
    pointer.x = ((event.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1;
    pointer.y = -((event.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1;
  }


  renderer.domElement.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
    pointerToNDC(event);
    raycaster.setFromCamera(pointer, camera);
    const hits = raycaster.intersectObject(plane, false);
    if (hits.length > 0) {
      isDraggingPlane = true;
      lastPointerX = event.clientX;
      lastPointerY = event.clientY;
      renderer.domElement.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
    }
  });

  renderer.domElement.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
    if (!isDraggingPlane) return;

    const dx = event.clientX - lastPointerX;
    const dy = event.clientY - lastPointerY;
    lastPointerX = event.clientX;
    lastPointerY = event.clientY;

    rotY += dx * 0.008;
    rotX += dy * 0.008;

    const limit = Math.PI / 2 - 0.05;
    rotX = Math.max(-limit, Math.min(limit, rotX));

    updateScene();
  });

  renderer.domElement.addEventListener("pointerup", (event) => {
    if (isDraggingPlane) {
      isDraggingPlane = false;
      renderer.domElement.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
    }
  });

  function makeArrow(color) {
    return new THREE.ArrowHelper(
      new THREE.Vector3(1, 0, 0),
      origin,
      0.9,
      color,
      0.14,
      0.07
    );
  }

  const arrowU = makeArrow(0xd62728);
  const arrowV = makeArrow(0x1f77b4);
  const arrowN = makeArrow(0x111111);
  scene.add(arrowU, arrowV, arrowN);

  const p0Marker = new THREE.Mesh(
    new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.07, 24, 24),
    new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x2ca02c })
  );
  scene.add(p0Marker);

  const baseMarker = new THREE.Mesh(
    new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.06, 20, 20),
    new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x444444 })
  );
  scene.add(baseMarker);

  const planeGeom = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
  const plane = new THREE.Mesh(
    planeGeom,
    new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x66c2a5,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.5,
      side: THREE.DoubleSide
    })
  );
  scene.add(plane);

  const planeEdge = new THREE.LineLoop(
    new THREE.BufferGeometry(),
    new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0x666666 })
  );
  scene.add(planeEdge);

  const u0 = new THREE.Vector3(1, 0, 0);
  const v0 = new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0);
  let rotY = 0;
  let rotX = 0;
  let u = u0.clone();
  let v = v0.clone();

  function getP0() {
    return new THREE.Vector3(
      parseFloat(p0x.value),
      parseFloat(p0y.value),
      parseFloat(p0z.value)
    );
  }

  function currentNormalRaw() {
    return new THREE.Vector3().crossVectors(u, v);
  }

  function updateArrow(arrow, dir, base, len) {
    arrow.position.copy(base);
    arrow.setDirection(dir.clone().normalize());
    arrow.setLength(len, 0.16, 0.08);
  }


  function updateScene() {
    const p0 = getP0();

    const qy = new THREE.Quaternion().setFromAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0), rotY);
    const qx = new THREE.Quaternion().setFromAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(1, 0, 0), rotX);
    const q = qy.clone().multiply(qx);

    u = u0.clone().applyQuaternion(q).normalize();
    v = v0.clone().applyQuaternion(q).normalize();

    const nRaw = currentNormalRaw();
    const norm = nRaw.length();

    p0Marker.position.copy(p0);

    if (norm < 1e-6) {
      arrowN.visible = false;
      plane.visible = false;
      planeEdge.visible = false;
      eqn.innerHTML = "Degenerate case: u and v are parallel.";
      return;
    }

    const n = nRaw.clone().normalize();
    let uRect = u.clone().normalize();
    let vRect = v.clone().sub(uRect.clone().multiplyScalar(v.dot(uRect)));
    if (vRect.length() < 1e-6) {
      vRect = new THREE.Vector3().crossVectors(n, uRect);
    }
    vRect.normalize();

    const s = 1.35;
    const base = p0.clone().add(uRect.clone().multiplyScalar(-s)).add(vRect.clone().multiplyScalar(-s));

    updateArrow(arrowU, uRect, base, 0.9);
    updateArrow(arrowV, vRect, base, 0.9);
    updateArrow(arrowN, n, base, 0.9);
    baseMarker.position.copy(base);
    arrowN.visible = true;
    plane.visible = true;
    planeEdge.visible = true;

    const a = p0.clone().add(uRect.clone().multiplyScalar( s)).add(vRect.clone().multiplyScalar( s));
    const b = p0.clone().add(uRect.clone().multiplyScalar( s)).add(vRect.clone().multiplyScalar(-s));
    const c = p0.clone().add(uRect.clone().multiplyScalar(-s)).add(vRect.clone().multiplyScalar(-s));
    const d = p0.clone().add(uRect.clone().multiplyScalar(-s)).add(vRect.clone().multiplyScalar( s));

    const verts = new Float32Array([
      a.x,a.y,a.z,  b.x,b.y,b.z,  d.x,d.y,d.z,
      b.x,b.y,b.z,  c.x,c.y,c.z,  d.x,d.y,d.z
    ]);
    planeGeom.setAttribute("position", new THREE.BufferAttribute(verts, 3));
    planeGeom.computeVertexNormals();

    const edgeVerts = new Float32Array([
      a.x,a.y,a.z,
      b.x,b.y,b.z,
      c.x,c.y,c.z,
      d.x,d.y,d.z
    ]);
    planeEdge.geometry.dispose();
    planeEdge.geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
    planeEdge.geometry.setAttribute("position", new THREE.BufferAttribute(edgeVerts, 3));

    const aa = n.x;
    const bb = n.y;
    const cc = n.z;
    const dd = -(aa * p0.x + bb * p0.y + cc * p0.z);

    eqn.innerHTML =
      `u = (${fmt(uRect.x)}, ${fmt(uRect.y)}, ${fmt(uRect.z)})<br>` +
      `v = (${fmt(vRect.x)}, ${fmt(vRect.y)}, ${fmt(vRect.z)})<br>` +
      `n = (${fmt(aa)}, ${fmt(bb)}, ${fmt(cc)})<br>` +
      `p₀ = (${fmt(p0.x)}, ${fmt(p0.y)}, ${fmt(p0.z)})<br>` +
      `base = (${fmt(base.x)}, ${fmt(base.y)}, ${fmt(base.z)})<br><br>` +
      `${fmt(aa)}x + ${fmt(bb)}y + ${fmt(cc)}z + ${fmt(dd)} = 0`;
  }

  const controlsInputs = [p0x, p0y, p0z];
  for (const input of controlsInputs) {
    input.addEventListener("input", updateScene);
  }

  function resize() {
    const w = canvasHost.clientWidth || 900;
    const h = canvasHost.clientHeight || (w * 0.4);
    const aspect = w / h;
    const viewHeight = 2.2;
    camera.left = -viewHeight * aspect;
    camera.right = viewHeight * aspect;
    camera.top = viewHeight;
    camera.bottom = -viewHeight;
    camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
    renderer.setSize(w, h, false);
  }

  window.addEventListener("resize", resize);
  resize();
  updateScene();

  renderer.setAnimationLoop(() => {
    renderer.render(scene, camera);
  });

  return wrapper;
}
```
